creator: junker@jazz.snu.ac.kr
text:
I upgrade this ports.

 - PDFENCRYPT makefile option for export control of pdf_sec.ps
 - FreeType-1.1 library dependency.
 - graphics/jpeg depedency.

You can get newer ports in

 ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/ \
   ftghostscript5.ports.980722.tar.gz

(I lost the original ports, so I can't provide diffs)

-- 
 ----Cool FreeBSD!----MSX Forever!---J.U.N.K.E.R/Beat Snatchers!----
  CHOI Junho <junker@jazz.snu.ac.kr>  http://jazz.snu.ac.kr/~junker
 Distributed Computing System Lab,CS Dept.,Seoul National Univ., ROK
